title: The raw data of Spatial omics of glioma
author: Liu, Bohan
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Our files include the raw data from single-cell RNA sequencing, spatial transcriptomics sequencing conducted in our study. The raw data of the paper "Deciphering radial glial stem-like cells based on spatial multi-omics guides safe therapy in glioma".
steps_raw: Our files include the raw data from single-cell RNA sequencing, spatial transcriptomics sequencing conducted in our study. The raw data of the paper "Deciphering radial glial stem-like cells based on spatial multi-omics guides safe therapy in glioma".
